zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.於1232年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾文維其可時，他的父親George Andrews , Esq.38歲，母親Lady Marguerite Burford27歲。他於1249年之前與Lady Magdalen Tokett在英國波藍德卡萊爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1286年在英國波藍德卡萊爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.于1232年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾文維其可时，他的父亲George Andrews , Esq.38岁，母亲Lady Marguerite Burford27岁。他于1249年之前与Lady Magdalen Tokett在英国波藍德卡萊爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1286年在英国波藍德卡萊爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. was born in 1232, in Winwick, Northamptonshire, England, his father, George Andrews , Esq., was 38 and his mother, Lady Marguerite Burford, was 27. He married Lady Magdalen Tokett before 1249, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1286, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. est né en 1232, à Winwick, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, George Andrews , Esq., avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lady Marguerite Burford, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Magdalen Tokett avant 1249, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1286, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. 1232 in Winwick, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Andrews , Esq. 38 und seine Mutter Lady Marguerite Burford 27. Er hat vor 1249 in Carlisle, Cumberland, England Lady Magdalen Tokett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1286 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Carlisle, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. è nato il nel 1232 nel Winwick, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, George Andrews , Esq., aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Lady Marguerite Burford, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Magdalen Tokett prima del 1249, nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1286, nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.が1232年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウィンウィックで生まれた時，父George Andrews , Esq.は38歳，母Lady Marguerite Burfordは27歳であった。1249年以前にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルでLady Magdalen Tokettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1286年にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.(이)가 1232년 영국 노르섬프토실르 윈윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Andrews , Esq.(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Marguerite Burford(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1249년 이전 영국 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 Lady Magdalen Tokett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1286년 영국 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. nasceu em 1232, em Winwick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Andrews , Esq., tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marguerite Burford, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Magdalen Tokett antes 1249, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1286, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. родился в 1232 г. в местности винвикк, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени George Andrews , Esq. было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marguerite Burford, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Magdalen Tokett перед 1249 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1286 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. nació en 1232, en Winwick, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, George Andrews , Esq., tenía 38 años y su mamá, Lady Marguerite Burford, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lady Magdalen Tokett antes de 1249, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1286, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
